null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [], "description": "The PAM module for `fscrypt` through v0.3.2 doesn't adequately validate `fscrypt` metadata files, allowing users to create malicious metadata files that prevent other users from logging in. A local user can cause a denial of service by creating a `fscrypt` metadata file that prevents other users from logging into the system. We recommend upgrading to v0.3.3 or above.\n\nFor more details, see [CVE-2022-25327](https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2022-25327).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p93v-m2r2-4387", "github_reviewed_at": "2022-03-01T21:05:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p93v-m2r2-4387", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p93v-m2r2-4387"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2022-03-01T21:05:01Z", "references": ["https://github.com/google/fscrypt/security/advisories/GHSA-p93v-m2r2-4387", "https://github.com/google/fscrypt/commit/91aa3ebf42032ca783c41f9ec25d885875f66ddb", "https://pkg.go.dev/vuln/GO-2022-0340", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p93v-m2r2-4387"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/google/fscrypt/security-advisories/GHSA-p93v-m2r2-4387", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "github.com/google/fscrypt", "summary": "Denial of service via insufficient metadata validation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T16:00:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p93v-m2r2-4387", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.3.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/google/fscrypt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.3.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Denial of service via insufficient metadata validation
